docket_entries.description: COMPLAINT WAS NOT SIGN BY THE PLTF, BUT BY AN EM- PLOYEE. EMPLOYEE WILL HAVE MR. NAVID BAHRAMI SIGN A COPY OF THE COMPLAINT AND MAIL IT TO SMALL CLAIM
COPY OF THE COMPLAINT, WITH THE ORIGINAL SIGNATURE OF THE PLAINTIFF NAVID BAHRAMI, FILED.
INVALID POS. AGENT FOR SERVICE NOT NAMED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY BAHRAMI, NAVID AS TO DEFENDANT SUTTER STOCKTON GARAGE A&A QUALITY TOWING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-19-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-03-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
NOT. OF CONT. SENT TO DAVID BAHRAMI RETURNED, INS. ADDRESS.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUTTER STOCKTON GARAGE A&A QUALITY TOWING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFT A & A QUALITY TOWING TO RELEASE THE CAR TO PLTF WITHOUT COST TO PLTF.A&A QUALITY TOWING CAN SEEK REIMBURSEMENT FOR ANY CHARGES & COSTS FROM
